scripts.start: mkdir -p $HOME/heygoogle-data && setsid -f bash -c 'exec typenode ./nodejs/server.ts >> $HOME/heygoogle-data/server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null' && sleep 0.3 && pgrep -nf '[n]odejs/server.ts' > $HOME/heygoogle-data/server.pid && echo "started pid $(cat $HOME/heygoogle-data/server.pid)"
scripts.stop: (pkill -TERM -f '[n]odejs/server.ts' && echo stopped) || echo "nothing to stop"; rm -f $HOME/heygoogle-data/server.pid
